rationale.rules-based-checks: Deterministic scanners inspect artifacts and enforce configurable pre-publish policies.
rationale.ai-code-insecurity: Original taxonomy and incident analysis characterize AI-code security vulnerabilities.
rationale.oversight-scaling-inversion: Vibe coding delegates production artifacts while largely skipping manual review.
rationale.oversight-explanation: Findings include severity, location, CWE, and self-contained remediation guidance.
rationale.framework: Modular gate architecture supports reusable policies and pipeline integrations.
rationale.built-system: Implemented scanner was evaluated across eight synthetic vulnerable projects.
rationale.agentic: AI serves as primary author while complete artifacts receive gate-level review.
